name: omnipresence-vscode
description: Reports workspace/repo/branch and broad activity to OmniPresence for Discord Rich Presence. Exact file names are private by default.

omnipresence.endpoint.description: URL of the local OmniPresence context endpoint. Only change this if you have a custom OmniPresence setup.

omnipresence.allowFileTitles.description: When enabled, the exact file name of the active editor is included in the reported payload. Disabled by default to keep file names private.

omnipresence.enabled.description: Enable or disable OmniPresence reporting from VS Code.

omnipresence.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before a context update is sent after an event fires.
